asset_strategy.primary_goal: Build trust in engineering precision and material quality to drive waitlist signups.
asset_strategy.creative_priority: Engineering-first visuals with high-contrast macro shots of specs and material.
asset_strategy.why_this_asset_mix_wins: Balances technical proof (socket, lip, material) with desire (colourways, wrist fit) while keeping production effort realistic. Prioritizes assets that directly support the hook and CTA.

image_blueprint.subject: Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) holding Royal Pop case, side view
image_blueprint.purpose: Establish product identity and fit in one frame. Must feel premium and precise.
image_blueprint.composition: Centered, shallow depth of field. Royal Pop case partially inserted into adapter, showing 0.7mm lip contact.
image_blueprint.lighting: Hard side lighting to emphasize FKM texture and socket geometry.
image_blueprint.background: Neutral matte grey (RGB 120,120,120) to avoid distraction.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter upright, Royal Pop case angled 15° forward for lip visibility.
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: Top 20% reserved for hook text (e.g., '40.35mm. 0.7mm. Exact fit.')
image_blueprint.notes: This is the cover frame for the reel. Must be render-ready for HERO_PUSH_IN motion.

image_blueprint.subject: Exploded view of adapter specs with caliper measurements
image_blueprint.purpose: Visually prove 40.35mm socket and 0.7mm lip dimensions.
image_blueprint.composition: Orthographic top/side views with digital caliper overlay (realistic 0.1mm precision).
image_blueprint.lighting: Flat even lighting to avoid shadows on measurements.
image_blueprint.background: White (RGB 255,255,255) with subtle grid lines (1mm spacing).
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter disassembled into socket, lip, and lug components. Caliper jaws touching 0.7mm lip.
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: Bottom 30% for spec callouts (e.g., '40.35mm inner socket')
image_blueprint.notes: Use for SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION video. Caliper must be realistically rendered (not placeholder).

image_blueprint.subject: Macro shot of FKM rubber texture and 0.7mm lip
image_blueprint.purpose: Highlight material quality and precision of the retaining lip.
image_blueprint.composition: Extreme close-up (10x magnification) of lip edge. Depth of field <0.5mm to show texture.
image_blueprint.lighting: Raking light at 45° to create micro-shadows in FKM texture.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Lip edge facing camera, slight tilt to show thickness.
image_blueprint.notes: Use for MACRO_SWEEP video. Must be shot with macro lens or ultra-high-res render.

image_blueprint.subject: All five colourways in a single frame
image_blueprint.purpose: Showcase design options while reinforcing premium material.
image_blueprint.composition: Grid layout (2x3) with Monochrome in center. Each adapter angled 30° to show lip.
image_blueprint.lighting: Consistent soft lighting across all swatches to preserve colour accuracy.
image_blueprint.background: Neutral grey (RGB 180,180,180) with subtle radial gradient.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapters upright, lugs facing forward. No Royal Pop case.
must_show: All five colourways (Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso)
image_blueprint.notes: Use for COLOUR_REVEAL video. Colour accuracy is critical—verify against Pantone references.

image_blueprint.subject: Royal Pop on wrist with Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome)
image_blueprint.composition: Wrist shot from above, watch face visible. Adapter fully integrated with Royal Pop.
image_blueprint.lighting: Natural diffused light to avoid harsh shadows on wrist.
image_blueprint.background: Minimalist (e.g., wooden surface or neutral fabric).
image_blueprint.product_pose: Watch angled 45° to show adapter profile. Strap adjusted to standard 22mm width.
must_show: Royal Pop case fully seated in adapter
image_blueprint.text_safe_area: Top 20% for optional text (e.g., 'Designed for the wrist.')
image_blueprint.notes: Use for WRIST_FIT_DEMO video. Must be shot manually for realism.

image_blueprint.subject: Adapter next to a standard 22mm watch strap for scale
image_blueprint.composition: Top-down view with adapter and strap side by side. Ruler or grid overlay for scale.
image_blueprint.product_pose: Adapter and strap laid flat, lugs aligned.
image_blueprint.notes: Low priority but useful for technical audiences.

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Royal Pop case slowly clicks into adapter (0.5s), then holds.
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow push-in (1.5x magnification over 3s) to emphasize fit.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold for 0.5s, then cut to next clip.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Ultra-realistic 8K render of Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) holding Royal Pop case. Side view, shallow depth of field. Royal Pop case clicks into adapter with satisfying precision. FKM rubber texture visible. Neutral matte grey background. Hard side lighting to emphasize socket geometry and 0.7mm lip. No motion blur. No lens distortion.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, low resolution, cartoonish, unrealistic shadows, floating objects, excessive motion blur, lens flare, chromatic aberration, dust particles, fingerprints, over-saturated colours, generic product shot.
motion_blueprint.notes: This is the opening clip. Must feel premium and precise. Use sound design for the 'click' of the case seating.

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Digital caliper jaws close on 0.7mm lip (1s), then open to reveal 40.35mm socket (1s).
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow zoom on caliper measurement (1.2x over 4s).
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold for 0.5s, then cut to next clip.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Orthographic top/side views of Cradle Adapter V1 disassembled into socket, lip, and lug components. Digital caliper (realistic 0.1mm precision) measures 0.7mm lip thickness, then 40.35mm socket diameter. White background with subtle 1mm grid lines. Flat even lighting. No shadows on measurements. Caliper jaws move smoothly to highlight dimensions. On-screen text appears sequentially: '40.35mm socket', '0.7mm retaining lip'.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry measurements, inconsistent scale, overlapping text, unrealistic caliper, floating objects, excessive motion blur, lens flare, chromatic aberration, low resolution, cartoonish.
motion_blueprint.notes: Critical for technical trust. Caliper motion must be smooth and precise.

motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow horizontal sweep (10° arc over 3s) to reveal FKM texture and lip edge.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold for 0.5s, then cut to next clip.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Extreme macro shot (10x magnification) of Cradle Adapter V1's 0.7mm retaining lip and FKM rubber texture. Depth of field <0.5mm. Raking light at 45° to create micro-shadows in texture. Black background. Lip edge facing camera, slight tilt to show thickness. Crown notch geometry visible. No motion blur. No lens distortion. Camera sweeps horizontally to reveal texture and lip precision.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, low resolution, unrealistic shadows, floating objects, excessive motion blur, lens flare, chromatic aberration, dust particles, fingerprints, over-sharpening, cartoonish, generic product shot.
motion_blueprint.notes: Must feel tactile and premium. Use sound design for subtle 'rubber' texture.

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Each colourway fades in sequentially (0.5s per swatch).
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow zoom-out (1.1x over 4s) to fit all swatches.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold for 0.5s, then cut to next clip.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Grid layout (2x3) of Cradle Adapter V1 in all five colourways: Monochrome (center), Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso. Each adapter angled 30° to show lip. Consistent soft lighting to preserve colour accuracy. Neutral grey background with subtle radial gradient. Colourways fade in sequentially (Monochrome first, then others). On-screen text appears for each colourway. No motion blur.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Colour bleeding, inconsistent shadows, over-saturation, unrealistic colours, floating objects, excessive motion blur, lens flare, chromatic aberration, low resolution, cartoonish, generic product shot.
motion_blueprint.notes: Colour accuracy is critical. Use Pantone references for FKM rubber.

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Wrist rotates 30° to show adapter profile (1s), then holds.
motion_blueprint.camera_motion: Slow push-in (1.3x over 3s) to emphasize fit.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold for 0.5s, then cut to CTA.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Wrist shot from above, Royal Pop on wrist with Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome). Watch face visible. Adapter fully integrated with Royal Pop. Natural diffused lighting. Minimalist background (e.g., wooden surface). Wrist rotates 30° to show adapter profile. Strap adjusted to standard 22mm width. No motion blur. No lens distortion.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Overly posed hand, distracting background, unrealistic wrist angle, blurry, low resolution, floating objects, excessive motion blur, lens flare, chromatic aberration, cartoonish.
motion_blueprint.notes: Must be shot manually for realism. Use sound design for subtle wrist movement.

motion_blueprint.subject_motion: Royal Pop case clicks into adapter (0.5s), then holds.
motion_blueprint.transition_out: Hold for 0.5s, then cut to CTA text.
motion_blueprint.prompt: Repeat of VID-01 but shorter duration. Ultra-realistic 8K render of Cradle Adapter V1 (Monochrome) holding Royal Pop case. Side view, shallow depth of field. Royal Pop case clicks into adapter with satisfying precision. Neutral matte grey background. Hard side lighting. No motion blur.
motion_blueprint.negative_prompt: Blurry, low resolution, cartoonish, unrealistic shadows, floating objects, excessive motion blur, lens flare, chromatic aberration, dust particles, fingerprints, over-saturated colours.
motion_blueprint.notes: Optional but useful for reinforcing the hook before CTA.

asset_dependencies.reason: HERO_PUSH_IN motion requires the HERO still as source.
SPEC_CALLOUT_MOTION requires the TECHNICAL_BOARD still as source.
MACRO_SWEEP requires the DETAIL_MACRO still as source.
COLOUR_REVEAL requires the COLOURWAY_CARD still as source.
WRIST_FIT_DEMO requires the WRIST_SHOT still as source.
COVER_TO_MOTION_TRANSITION requires the HERO still as source.

missing_assets.missing_item: Royal Pop case 3D model or physical sample
missing_assets.why_needed: Required for IMG-01, IMG-05, and all motion clips involving the Royal Pop.
missing_assets.impact_if_missing: Cannot produce HERO, WRIST_SHOT, or any motion clips showing the adapter with the Royal Pop. Would block 60% of the asset plan.

missing_assets.why_needed: Required for accurate material representation in all assets.
missing_assets.impact_if_missing: Material quality cannot be convincingly shown, undermining the premium positioning.

missing_assets.why_needed: Required for colour accuracy in IMG-04 and VID-04.
missing_assets.impact_if_missing: Colourways may appear inconsistent or unrealistic, reducing trust.

build_order.why_first: These are the highest-priority assets for the hook and technical proof. IMG-01 is also the cover frame and source for VID-01.
These clips directly support the hook and primary angle. VID-01 is the opening clip, and VID-02 provides critical technical proof.
IMG-03 supports material proof, and IMG-04 supports the colourway angle. Both are required for VID-03 and VID-04.
These clips expand on material and colourway details, reinforcing the primary angle.
Requires physical samples and a model. Can be done in parallel with render assets but is lower priority.
VID-05 is useful but not required for minimum viable. VID-06 is optional.

handoff_for_visual_brief.cta_asset: CTA text overlay on final frame of VID-04
handoff_for_visual_brief.editing_note: Use the recommended hook ('40.35mm. 0.7mm. Exact fit.') as on-screen text for VID-01. Sync spec callouts in VID-02 with the script beats. Keep cuts tight (1–2s per clip) but slow down for spec reveals. Use satisfying sound design for the 'click' of the Royal Pop seating and caliper motion.

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
